channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Celebrating the Legacy of Top Gun: A Look at the Cast's Journey Over Time
item.description: The article explores the careers of the actors from the 1986 film 'Top Gun,' highlighting their journeys post-film. It details how some stars like Tom Cruise and Val Kilmer remained prominent in Holly...

item.title: Ancient rock carvings in Delhi's Central Ridge reveal pre-Ashokan history
item.description: Archaeologists have discovered cup-like depressions and linear markings on a rock in Delhi's Central Ridge forest, potentially dating back to the pre-Ashokan era. These findings, noticed by naturalist...

item.title: England and South Africa Cricket Coaches Face Major Changes Amid Leadership Shifts
item.description: The cricket coaching landscape is undergoing significant upheaval as England and the SA20 tournament grapple with leadership changes. Brendon McCullum's sacking as England's Test coach and Stephen Fle...

item.title: Journalist's Home Subjected to Alleged Arson Attempt in Laguna
item.description: A journalist in Laguna, Philippines, reported an incident where their residence was allegedly targeted by a fire. The event occurred early Thursday morning when the homeowner and their spouse woke up ...

item.title: CAC Launches Sixth Batch of Company Deregistration, Aims to Remove 100,000 Non-Compliant Firms
item.description: The Corporate Affairs Commission (CAC) has initiated its sixth batch of deregistering companies that failed to meet statutory obligations, putting 100,000 firms at risk of removal from Nigeria's corpo...

item.title: Spain Advances to World Cup Final After Defeating France
item.description: Madrid erupted in celebration as Spain secured a 2-0 victory over France in the FIFA World Cup semi-final, sending them to the final. Thousands of fans filled central Madrid, waving the red-and-yellow...

item.title: Boda boda Riders Demand Justice After Chairman's Alleged Murder in Kawangware
item.description: Boda boda operators in Dagoretti North staged a peaceful protest demanding justice for Thomas Kitheka, the chairman of Congo Stage boda boda riders who was allegedly murdered. The riders marched throu...

item.title: Africa Needs to Reform Healthcare Training
item.description: African nations are facing growing pressure to overhaul their healthcare training systems due to severe shortages of qualified medical professionals and rising disease burdens. Current training models...

item.title: Sindh CM addresses financial challenges and infrastructure projects
item.description: Sindh Chief Minister Murad Ali Shah stated that the allocation for provinces under the National Finance Commission (NFC) Award has decreased this year due to provinces contributing part of their share...

item.title: JMPD officers rescue abandoned newborn baby in Johannesburg
item.description: On July 16, 2026, Johannesburg Metropolitan Police Department (JMPD) officers from the Rea Vaya Unit rescued an abandoned newborn baby girl in the inner city. The incident occurred around 11:45pm when...

item.title: Canadian Wildfire Smoke Triggers Hazardous Air Quality Across the Eastern United States
item.description: Smoke from more than 100 uncontrolled wildfires burning across Ontario has spread hundreds of miles into the Midwest and Northeastern United States, creating hazardous air quality conditions in many m...

item.title: Election Commission Extends SIR Timeline for Key States Amid Electoral Roll Revisions
item.description: The Election Commission has extended the deadlines for house-to-house verification as part of the Special Intensive Revision (SIR) of electoral rolls in Delhi, Punjab, Karnataka, and Telangana. In Del...

item.title: Institutional Failure and Fraud in Nigerian Governance
item.description: The article discusses a major governance scandal in Nigeria involving the alleged creation of a fake government agency, the Presidential Foreign Intervention Promotion Council (PFIPC), which secured a...

item.title: Europe Faces Military Crackdowns Amid Cocaine Smuggling Surge
item.description: The article details Europe's escalating battle against cocaine trafficking along its coastlines, highlighting a call-to-action memo urging nations to adopt aggressive tactics. A 2.5-ton cocaine shipme...

item.title: Dorothy Tivis: Pioneering Model and Feminist Trailblazer in Postwar Fashion
item.description: Dorothy Tivis (1919–2010) was a groundbreaking American model, fashion executive, and feminist who reshaped postwar fashion and challenged societal norms. Born in Fargo, North Dakota, she transitioned...

item.title: ICE Conducts Record Arrests of Illegal Immigrants in South Texas Enforcement Operation
item.description: U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) announced a record-breaking single-day operation in South Texas, resulting in the arrest of 238 illegal immigrants. The Harlingen Field Office, working w...

item.title: Judge's Gun Linked to Robberies, Suspect Killed in Shootout
item.description: A Beretta pistol registered to Kenya's Court of Appeal Judge Aggrey Muchelule was recovered from the house of slain robbery suspect Vincent Ochieng. The gun is linked to a July 4 robbery at Chaii Wali...

item.title: Studies raise concerns that excessive reliance on generative AI may weaken long-term learning and critical thinking
item.description: Recent research is raising concerns that although generative artificial intelligence tools such as ChatGPT, Claude and similar services can improve productivity and make everyday tasks easier, excessi...

item.title: Northern Ontario Police Lay Stunt Charges on Highway 69
item.description: The Ontario Provincial Police (OPP) in northern Ontario have laid two stunt charges against individuals involved in a high-profile incident on Highway 69. The charges stem from an alleged traffic stop...

item.title: Poll highlights California voters' support for Governor Newsom and opposition to AI data center expansion
item.description: A recent poll reveals significant public support for California Governor Gavin Newsom (Becerra) amid growing concerns over environmental policies and the expansion of AI data centers. The survey, cond...
